metadata.label: gen2/AppliedIntuition-CloudInfra
metadata.title: Software Engineer - Cloud Infrastructure
metadata.team_direction: is a leading company in the field of physical AI, creating the digital infrastructure necessary for intelligent machines

revision_priority: 修正 Summary 第 3 句及 DiDi Project blockquote 中 "**2022 city**" / "**2023 city**" / "**20+ city**" 的加粗范围，将 "city" 移出粗体，仅保留数字加粗。
修订 Summary 首句 "3+ years building Go, Java, and Python services" 措辞，明确 Go 资历仅限 TikTok 实习阶段（6 个月），避免 HR 对照时间线时产生可信度疑问。

findings.field: Professional Summary; TikTok / DiDi / Temu bullets
findings.issue: 正文里把修饰性限定词也加粗了，例如 `team-maintained`，会分散 ATS 和人工扫读对技术栈与量化信号的注意力。
findings.fix: 只加粗技术名词、系统名和规模/结果数字；把 `team-maintained`、`internal`、`existing` 这类修饰词恢复为普通文本。

findings.issue: 首句以“Transitioning from data analysis to software engineering”开头，首屏更像转型说明而不是目标岗位锚点，会削弱 6-8 秒扫读时的角色感。
findings.fix: 把首句改成直接的岗位定位，例如先写 `Cloud infrastructure / backend engineer` 或 `Infrastructure-focused software engineer`，再把转型背景放到第二句。

findings.issue: 同一份简历里，编程语言/开发栈的使用级证据过多，TikTok 段同时铺开 Go、Python、Bash/Shell、C++，DiDi 段又同时铺开 Java、Python、React、MySQL、Redis，读起来接近堆栈堆砌而不是单线程主线叙事。
findings.fix: 每段经历只保留 1-2 个主语言作为主线，其余语言放到真正需要它们的单条 bullet 里；例如 TikTok 以 Go/Python 为主，DiDi 以 Java/Python 为主，Bash/Shell/C++/React 只在必须的具体交付点出现。

findings.field: TikTok Experience; Security Platform Release Hardening project
findings.issue: 最新相关经历几乎都由百分比改进组成，缺少更能支撑可信度的 Tier 1 规模/边界信号，首条 bullet 也主要是收益而不是规模。
findings.fix: 在 TikTok 的首条 bullet 或项目首条 bullet 里补一个可追问的 scope 信号，例如服务数、事件量、每周发布频率、review 流量、团队边界或故障窗口。

revision_priority: [MUST] 把 Summary 第一句改成直接的 cloud infrastructure / backend engineer 定位，别让“Transitioning from data analysis”占首屏。
[MUST] 收敛 TikTok 和 DiDi 的语言栈展示，每段经历只保留 1-2 个主语言作为主线，其余语言只在必要的具体 bullet 中出现。
[MUST] 在 TikTok 最新经历或项目里补一个 Tier 1 scope 信号，让首屏不只剩百分比提升。
[SHOULD] 去掉修饰词的加粗，只保留技术名词、系统名和规模数字的加粗。
[SHOULD] 如果确实有 cloud-infra / multi-cloud / simulation 相关桥接点，补一句把安全/电商/运营平台经验和目标岗位连接起来。
raw_json.revision_instructions: [MUST] Rewrite the first summary sentence so it opens with a direct target-role anchor such as `Cloud infrastructure / backend engineer`, then move the transition story to sentence 2. [MUST] Reduce stack breadth per experience: TikTok should read as Go/Python-first, DiDi as Java/Python-first; keep Bash/Shell/C++/React only where a concrete bullet truly needs them. [MUST] Add one Tier 1 scope signal to the latest TikTok role or its project (service count, event volume, weekly release cadence, review throughput, or team boundary). [SHOULD] Remove bold from modifiers like `team-maintained` and keep emphasis on technical nouns and metrics. [SHOULD] Add one sentence bridging the infra work to multi-cloud deployment or simulation-style platform reliability if that bridge is accurate.
